title: GREENESAGE Rigid 6 inch 100 Pack Heavy Duty Disposable Paper White Plates Sugarcane Small Disposable Plates Strong Dishes for Picnic Wedding Party BBQ
features: Rigid Material - Made from high quality bagasse sugarcane, these small disposable paper plates are rigid and also biodegradable. These compostable plates will not harm the environment.
Packing: Including 100 pcs disposable plates, size of 6 inch. You can stock up these paper plates according to your using and choose the package that suits you.
Microwave and Freezer Safe - This strong and heavy-duty paper plates can be heated resistant without deforming. And also can be used with liquids, oil-resistant and leakproof.
For hot and cold - These paper plates can be used for hot and cold food. It offers reliable strength and not contain any wax lining.
Occasions: These paper party plates can used to hold steak, desserts, ice cream, pizza and so on. Suitable for any partys, family gatherings, BBQ, camping or any daily using.
description: Product Description Disposable Rigid Plates It is well known that the traditional one-using plates products have caused a lot of trouble to us. These disposable small plates made from sugarcane bagasse material and no toxic chemicals. No wax lining, BPA-free, gluten-free and plastic-free, you can use our disposable bowls for kids with peace of mind. The bagasse disposable plate is stronger, water and oil resistant, not easy to cut. You can use these white disposable bowls for fruits, snacks, salads, ice cream, sauce etc. Made from sugarcane fibers Our disposable plates are made from bagasse. Without additives and odors. Even children can safely use our disposable plates. Microwave and freezer safe These paper plates are safe to use in the microwave and freezer. It also does not melt or deform when heated in a microwave. Not Washing These disposable bowls are natural ingredient and sugarcane production.
